_comment: Catalog of FLDOE/CPALMS instructional toolkits + standards documents the maintainer provided (browser-saved/downloaded) on 2026-06-28. METADATA ONLY — the PDF binaries are not committed (large, copyrighted FLDOE materials); this indexes what exists, its grade/subject/pages, and a first-page excerpt so the ecosystem knows the resource exists and where it came from. title_confirmed=false means the title was taken from the first-page text, not a verified document title.
